Common.heroSubtitle: AI-powered marketing for Egyptian small and medium businesses.
Common.ownerControlHint: Every important step waits for a clear owner decision before the system moves.

Dashboard.title: Your growth journey starts here
Dashboard.subtitle: See the next useful step, what MarketMind already understands, and what is still locked until you confirm the business profile.
Dashboard.loadingBody: Loading the latest Discovery state and owner controls.
Dashboard.loadError: We could not load your latest journey. You can start a new Discovery or try again.
Dashboard.journeyTitle: What opens after each owner decision

empty.title: Start Discovery
empty.body: Tell MarketMind about the business. We will research public evidence, ask focused questions, and build the profile before any strategy work starts.

active.title: Continue Discovery
active.body: Research or interview work is already in progress. Continue from the same session so the profile keeps the evidence and answers together.

review.title: Review the business profile
review.body: Discovery has enough information to prepare a draft. Review it carefully before unlocking future strategy work.

confirmed.title: Discovery is confirmed
confirmed.body: The business profile is saved. Strategy is shown as the next product phase, but it is not active in this sprint.

unavailable.title: Discovery needs attention
unavailable.body: The previous journey is unavailable or failed. Start a new Discovery to rebuild the business context.

error.title: Could not load your journey
error.body: Something went wrong while loading your latest journey. Try again — your journey has not been removed.

verification.title: Verify your email to continue
verification.body: We sent a verification link to your email address. Please confirm it before starting or continuing Discovery.
verification.resendPrompt: Didn't get the email or the link expired?

strategy.discovery_required: Strategy stays locked until Discovery produces a profile.
strategy.profile_review_required: Strategy stays locked until you confirm the profile.
strategy.strategy_not_active: Strategy is planned next, but not available in this sprint.

control.title: You stay in control
control.body: MarketMind does not publish, launch strategy, or invent business facts without your confirmation. The dashboard always shows the next owner decision.

profile.title: Build the business profile first
profile.body: Discovery turns your intake, public sources, and chat answers into one business profile. This profile becomes the base for later strategy work.

evidence.title: Research and chat work together
evidence.body: The system can mention public evidence it found, then ask focused questions when the evidence is missing, weak, or needs owner confirmation.

confirm.title: Confirm before the next phase
confirm.body: When Discovery is ready, review the profile. Strategy remains locked until the profile is confirmed and the next product phase is active.

DiscoveryIntake.title: Tell us about your business
DiscoveryIntake.subtitle: Three short steps help us research accurately and start a conversation grounded in your real business.
DiscoveryIntake.businessTypePlaceholder: e.g. quick service restaurant, retail shop
DiscoveryIntake.ownerGoalPlaceholder: What would you most like to improve? (optional)
DiscoveryIntake.languageModeHint: Choose the language for your AI interview. This does not change the app interface.
DiscoveryIntake.socialLinksHint: Add your public pages to help us understand your digital presence. (optional)
DiscoveryIntake.validationUrlInvalid: Enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
DiscoveryIntake.step1Description: Share the details that distinguish your business and point research to the right place.
DiscoveryIntake.step2Description: These details are optional, but they make the research and questions more relevant.
DiscoveryIntake.step3Description: Add your public links and choose the language you prefer for the conversation.
DiscoveryIntake.businessNameHelp: The name customers know and the name shown on your page or storefront.
DiscoveryIntake.businessTypeHelp: Describe your business specifically so we can research a relevant market and competitors.
DiscoveryIntake.cityHelp: The main city where you serve customers.
DiscoveryIntake.areaHelp: Your district or neighbourhood. It helps us find nearby competitors.
DiscoveryIntake.addressHelp: A street or landmark is enough. Do not enter a personal address or sensitive data.
DiscoveryIntake.addressExample: El Gomhoreya Street, near the square
DiscoveryIntake.ownerGoalHelp: The most important result you want marketing to help you achieve now.
DiscoveryIntake.ownerGoalExample: Increase orders from customers in my area
DiscoveryIntake.competitorsHelp: Add businesses you consider close competitors. We will also look for others.
DiscoveryIntake.targetAudienceHelp: Describe the people who usually buy from you or whom you want to reach.
DiscoveryIntake.targetAudienceExample: Young adults and families aged 20 to 45
DiscoveryIntake.whyWeAskTitle: Why do we ask for this?
DiscoveryIntake.whyWeAskDescription: We use it to guide research. Anything we find remains evidence for your review, not a confirmed fact about your business.
DiscoveryIntake.nextAfterFormDescription: You will see research progress step by step, then answer questions grounded in the findings.

DiscoveryProgress.title: Researching your business
DiscoveryProgress.subtitle: We're gathering market context before your Discovery interview starts.
DiscoveryProgress.stepSearchPartialFailure: Some public search results could not be loaded

DiscoveryProgress.errorResearchFailed: Research could not complete. Your interview will proceed from your intake information.

DiscoveryProgress.errorRetryable: This step failed but will be retried automatically.
DiscoveryProgress.estimateDisclaimer: This estimate can change with external source response times and result volume.
DiscoveryProgress.whileYouWaitDescription: You can leave this page and return later. Research state and results are saved and restored automatically.
DiscoveryProgress.ownerControlDescription: Research only suggests information and questions. Nothing about your business is accepted without your review.

DiscoveryInterview.composerHint: Press Enter to submit. Shift+Enter for a new line.
DiscoveryInterview.finishDialogReadyDescription: Your profile is ready. We'll prepare your review now.
DiscoveryInterview.finishDialogIncompleteDescription: Your profile is not complete. The review will show missing information.
DiscoveryInterview.terminalFailedDescription: This Discovery session could not continue. Please start a new session.

DiscoveryReview.title: Review your Discovery results
DiscoveryReview.acknowledgeIncomplete: I understand this profile is incomplete and want to continue anyway.
DiscoveryReview.confirmedDescription: Your business profile has been confirmed. Strategy is planned next, but it is not active in this sprint.

hero.title: From understanding your business to improving marketing
hero.body: MarketMind turns your business data and owner context into a complete marketing journey: clear understanding, a growth plan, reviewable content, and continuous improvement based on real results.
hero.note: You stay the decision-maker at every stage: confirm facts, review the plan, and approve before execution.

steps.title: Business understanding
steps.text: Confirmed facts about your business and market

steps.title: Reviewable execution
steps.text: Content and campaigns ready before publishing

steps.title: Continuous improvement
steps.text: Results guide the next question and next step

evidence.title: Evidence before decisions.
evidence.body: Each tag above is something MarketMind really checks — a research source or a part of your business profile.

why.title: Research can suggest. You confirm.
why.body: Every business fact stays a research suggestion until you review it. The visual state makes the difference clear at a glance.
why.beforeText: The business opens from 9 AM to 11 PM
why.afterText: The business opens from 10 AM to midnight

roadmap.title: From understanding to improvement
roadmap.body: You can start with Discovery now. The rest of the journey is designed as clear, reviewable steps.
roadmap.hint: Scroll to see how each stage hands off to the next

cards.title: Discover
cards.desc: Build an evidence-backed view of your business through real research and a conversation with you.

cards.title: Research
cards.desc: Collect market and competitor evidence in a clear review pack.

cards.title: Strategize
cards.desc: Turn the confirmed profile into priorities, channels, and metrics.

cards.title: Create
cards.desc: Prepare content that fits the goal and context before execution.

cards.title: Publish or export
cards.desc: Safe publishing or export only after owner approval.

cards.title: Monitor
cards.desc: Show a clear performance snapshot without inventing unavailable metrics.

cards.title: Improve
cards.desc: Suggest reviewable improvements before any change is made.

discovery.eyebrow: Discovery journey — phase one in detail
discovery.title: Five steps, all working now
discovery.body: This is the fully available flow: from entering your business name to reviewing a confirmed profile.

steps.label: Receive business data
steps.desc: You enter your business name, category, and location — the starting point for research.

steps.label: Plan and run research
steps.desc: We turn your intake into search queries and run them against real sources.

steps.label: Filter evidence
steps.desc: We remove unrelated results and keep relevant findings with their sources.

steps.label: First research-backed question
steps.desc: We ask a question that completes the picture, based on what was found.

steps.label: Confirmed profile
steps.desc: Every fact you confirm is saved as a trusted business profile fact.

research.title: Watch real work happen step by step
research.body: Each stage moves only when there is actual work behind it — no fake counter and no made-up percentage.

stages.label: Request received
stages.detail: The research request was accepted and queued.

stages.label: Query planning
stages.detail: Business data is turned into focused search queries.

stages.label: Owner link check
stages.detail: Facebook and submitted links are reviewed.

stages.label: Evidence saved
stages.detail: Each result is stored with its source.

stages.label: First question ready
stages.detail: A question is drafted from what was found.

stages.label: Ready
stages.detail: The initial profile is ready for your review.

sample.name: Rose & Sugar Sweets
sample.meta: A fictional sweets shop in a fictional city —
sample.imageAlt: Fictional sweets shop storefront with a dessert display
sample.sourceNote: Research can reach public sources, but final truth stays with the business owner.
sample.acceptedText: The shop appears in a public local directory with reviews, customer photos, and clear opening hours.
sample.discardedText: A result with a similar name in another city was discarded because the activity and location are different.
sample.aiQuestion: I found public hours from 9 AM to 11 PM. Is that correct?
suggested: I want to edit the hours
sample.inputValue: No, we open at 10 AM and close at midnight.

faq.title: Everything is clear before you start

items.q: How do you protect my data?
items.a: MarketMind uses your business data to build your profile. To run research and the interview, your data is processed by approved service providers (search and AI) on MarketMind's behalf. We do not sell your data, and you control what gets saved. The full privacy policy, including retention and deletion, is being finalized and will be published before launch.

items.q: Where does the information come from?
items.a: From public search sources and official links for your business. Every result appears with its source, and nothing becomes a fact until you confirm it.
Research timing varies with the business and the sources we check. You can watch each stage move only when there is real work behind it — no fake timer or made-up percentage.

items.q: Can I continue later if I leave?
items.a: Yes. Discovery progress is saved, and you can return to continue from the same point.
You do. Research can suggest, but you confirm or reject every fact before it enters your profile.

finalCta.title: Ready to understand your business?
finalCta.body: Start Discovery now — real research, questions based on findings, and a profile you confirm.

footer.body: Understand your business and market with evidence before marketing starts.
footer.sourceLine: MarketMind — every result has a source.
